data.title: Restructure onboarding SKILL.md to define exactly 6 named batch approval groups
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on task 2fdd-1c9b (RED test). The structural test tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh must already exist and be failing (RED) before this implementation task begins.

After this task, the test turns GREEN: SKILL.md contains exactly 6 '## Batch Group N: <name>' section headers at the correct approval-prompt trigger points.

## Implementation Steps
Insert exactly 6 '## Batch Group N: <group-name>' headers into plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md at the following trigger points (matching epic SC):

1. ## Batch Group 1: dependency-install
   - Location: before Step 0 dependency install commands (brew/pip installs for bash, coreutils, git, and optional tools)
   - Skip guard: if no deps missing AND optional deps already installed, skip this prompt

2. ## Batch Group 2: scaffold-claude-structure
   - Location: before Phase 3 Step 2c DSO Shim Installation and directory creation (mkdir, cp, dso-setup.sh)
   - Skip guard: if .claude/ structure already present and shim already installed, skip this prompt

3. ## Batch Group 3: config-write
   - Location: before Step 2b Generate dso-config.conf and Step 2 Write .claude/project-understanding.md
   - Groups all file-write operations: project-understanding.md, dso-config.conf, design-notes.md, .semgrep.yml, CLAUDE.md, KNOWN-ISSUES template copy, .prettierignore update
   - Skip guard: if all config files already exist with current content, skip this prompt

4. ## Batch Group 4: initial-commit
   - Location: before the initial commit that contains all onboarding artifacts (written in groups 2-3)
   - This is the commit that happens before hooks are installed
   - Skip guard: if all artifacts already committed, skip this prompt

5. ## Batch Group 5: hook-install
   - Location: before Hook Installation in Step 2c (the final infrastructure action)
   - Must appear AFTER the initial-commit group, respecting the ORDERING CONSTRAINT already in SKILL.md
   - Skip guard: if hooks already installed, skip this prompt

6. ## Batch Group 6: final-commit
   - Location: before the final commit that includes hook installation artifacts
   - Skip guard: if no hook artifacts to commit, skip this prompt

Each header MUST:
- Follow the format '## Batch Group N: <name>' exactly (N = 1-6, name = kebab-case group name)
- Be immediately followed by a skip-guard comment block explaining when to skip
- Appear as a distinct ## section (not ### sub-section) so the structural test can count it

Constraints:
- Do NOT add more than 6 such headers (DD1: at most 6 prompts)
- Do NOT place any tool invocations outside a batch group section (DD2: no approval outside named groups)
- Each header name must be non-empty and human-readable (DD3: each prompt names its group)
- Skip-guard blocks ensure empty groups do not prompt (DD4: empty groups skip their prompt)
- Preserve all existing phase/step structure — add headers without removing existing content

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md contains exactly 6 lines matching '^## Batch Group [0-9]+:'
  Verify: [ "$(grep -c '^## Batch Group [0-9]*:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md)" = "6" ]
- [ ] All 6 batch group names are non-empty (no blank name after the colon)
  Verify: bash -c 'while IFS= read -r line; do name="${line#*: }"; [ -z "$name" ] && exit 1; done < <(grep "^## Batch Group [0-9]*:" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md); exit 0'
- [ ] Structural test tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes (no broken paths introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-referential-integrity.sh
- [ ] check-shim-refs.sh passes (no direct plugin paths added)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-shim-refs.sh plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
